node.title: Need Guidance to Restart Prep & Switch from Toxic Work Culture

article.title: Need Guidance to Restart Prep & Switch from Toxic Work Culture
article.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m in a very toxic office environment and really want to switch asap. I only want to target good product-based companies this time, so I want to prepare properly.

About me:

1 YOE

Full-time job (10–7, 5 days a week, high pressure)

Done 400+ LeetCode questions, but prep was always on & off → good knowledge but very low confidence.

Tried Striver’s A2Z for 2 months, managed only 90 questions (felt huge & lost motivation).

I’m thinking of first focusing on SDE Sheet to build confidence, then covering A2Z in one go to fill gaps.

Please don’t judge me 🙏 I see this community as family and need your guidance on how to restart prep in a structured way while managing job pressure.

Thanks in advance!

PS: I’m really very sorry 🙏 that I added a few clickbait tags just to gather more opinions. Deeply apologize for that.

post.content: Even I\'m in same situation can you add me in? But I have only solved 75 problems till now

I am in the same situation, but have no industry experience, and that\'s sad :(\n\nI hope things work out for me and you. I have seen people do around 500+ problems and managed to get in PBC, so we should be good
Why does everyone want to create a group? I asked a question for myself.
Please add me to the group. I am preparing for faang roles too, to get out of toxic environment.\nAlso, I have 7 yoe. I can help structure your prep strategy.
Plz count me too.\nhave been stuck in same situation guys!
Can you add me to the group? I have only solved 150 problems, and I\'m preparing for an interview now.

Bhai same scenario , but I would say please push your limits , DSA should be your bread butter , rice & pulses and everything , do DSA don\'t think of excuses like there is a pressure of 5 days even i am having that but when i come home after 1 hour of rest i do leetcode . \nFor people like us it\'s always a do or die scenario
Want to complete the sheet! looking for good opportunities\n
